title: Mock Test 42 - Phrasal Verbs (Set 2)
description: Phrasal Verbs (Set 2) নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। run out of, put off, break down, come across, call off, bring up, carry on, find out, give in, turn down ইত্যাদি।

questions.question: 'Run out of' phrase-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Run out of' = শেষ হয়ে যাওয়া / exhausted। যেমন: We have run out of milk.

questions.question: 'Put off' phrase-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Put off' = postpone / delay। যেমন: Don't put off your homework.

questions.question: 'Break down' phrase-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Break down' = stop working (car, machine) বা emotionally collapse।

questions.question: 'Come across' phrase-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Come across' = unexpectedly find/meet। যেমন: I came across an old friend.

questions.question: 'Call off' phrase-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Call off' = cancel। যেমন: The match was called off due to rain.

questions.question: The car ___ on the highway yesterday.
I ___ an interesting article in the newspaper.
The wedding was ___ because of the storm.
He ___ a very interesting topic during the meeting.
Please ___ with your good work.
Error: 'She turned down the job offer.' — সঠিক?
Error: 'We need to cut out on expenses.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Cut down on' = কমানো। 'Cut out' = বাদ দেওয়া। 'Cut down on expenses' হবে।

questions.question: Error: 'He dropped out of school at age 16.' — সঠিক?
Error: 'She got along with her new colleagues.' — সঠিক?
questions.explanation: 'Get along with' = ভালো সম্পর্ক থাকা — সঠিক।

questions.question: Fill: 'I need to ___ out who broke the window.'
Fill: 'She ___ up smoking for her health.'
Fill: 'The fire ___ out in the middle of the night.'
Fill: 'He ___ out the truth at last.'
অনুবাদ: 'দুধ ফুরিয়ে গেছে।'
options: The milk has run out of.
We have run out of milk.
questions.explanation: 'Run out of milk' = দুধ ফুরিয়ে যাওয়া।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে একটি পুরনো বন্ধুর দেখা পেয়ে গেল।'
options: She came across an old friend.
She came after an old friend.
She came up an old friend.
She came in an old friend.
